body.notes: Participation in IETF meetings constitutes agreement to the Note Well, which permits recording, transcription, and public archival of proceedings. See also BCP 78 (RFC 5378) and BCP 79 (RFC 8179) for IPR policies.

body.title: Strong Assertions of IoT Network Access Requirements
Secure Reporting of SUIT Update Status
A Concise Binary Object Representation (CBOR)-based Serialization Format for the Software Updates for Internet of Things (SUIT) Manifest
Update Management Extensions for Software Updates for Internet of Things (SUIT) Manifests
Cryptographic Algorithms for Internet of Things (IoT) Devices
